title: quercus edulis
intro: Quercus edulis, also known as the California live oak, is a deciduous tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The leaves, bark, and acorns of Quercus edulis have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Quercus edulis can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often consumed as a raw supplement or used in traditional folk remedies.
